latestCycle.goal: improve the late Andes mature-window precipitation split by suppressing lee-side low-level warm-rain persistence where terrain subsidence is strong but delivery exposure is absent
latestCycle.verifiedImprovement: terrain-coupled lee drying in src/weather/v2/microphysics5.js improved Andes precipRatio from 1.0394 to 1.0566 at 75600 and from 0.9271 to 0.9631 at 105480 while qrLowRatio at 105480 improved from 0.8871 to 0.9211 and the validation suite still passed

blockingGaps: broader Earth-like realism still needs fresh mature-window re-audits in the live app with the new terrain-coupled lee drying active across circulation, clouds, storms, and precipitation placement

orographic realism improved but is not solved: the Andes mature-window precipRatio is now 0.9631 at 105480, materially better than 0.9271 but still short of a clearly windward-favored late-window split
runtime smoothness is still not signed off; the latest live run now has healthy telemetry and still reports earth_update_p95_high, earth_update_max_high, and wind_targets_failing
the live browser path is functional, but the console still emits repeated THREE.WebGLRenderer texture-update warnings
world-class status still requires realism and smoothness to pass in the same fresh live run
cycleInputs: latest runtime summary from npm run agent:summarize-runtime-log

browserObservation.note: reused the canonical localhost solo-mode tab, kept the single-page-tab path clean, saw sim time advance from Day 0, 01:58 to Day 0, 07:38 in the same tab, and still captured non-empty runtime telemetry while repeated renderer texture warnings remained visible in the console

defaultNextPriority: stay on orographic realism and re-audit the Andes with the new terrain-coupled lee drying active, prioritizing the remaining later-window shortfall at 105480
keep the next physics cycle focused on one concrete src-side fix area before another broad terrain retune
decide whether the remaining Andes shortfall is now mostly a terrain/flow problem or a residual low-level condensate-retention problem before touching microphysics again
when smoothness becomes the blocker again, use the fresh non-empty runtime telemetry before changing renderer or worker performance behavior
keep validation on the clean world-class checkout only
